recent_excerpts: Check Point Research found a bug in VECT ransomware's encryption logic that permanently destroys files on Windows systems — no recovery possible even after paying.

The Gentlemen ransomware-as-a-service operation has infected over 320 victims, deploying separate encryptors for Windows/Linux and VMware ESXi systems to maximize disruption and ransom pressure on ent
The Gentlemen ransomware-as-a-service group uses the SystemBC SOCKS5 proxy tool to hide command-and-control traffic, according to a Check Point DFIR report analyzing a recent affiliate attack.
